title: FINGERINSPIRE 36Pcs 6 Colors Crochet Bear Head Applique Patches 35x40mm Cartoon Animal Sew On Appliques Little Bear Crochet Knitted Patch Cute Bear Knitted Handmade Applique Patch for Clothing
features: Package Includes: You will receive 36 pcs crochet bear head applique patches. Size: about 1.57inch/40mm wide, 1.37inch/35mm long, 1.5mm thick, 6 colors, 6pcs/color. The quantity is enough for your daily life needs.

High Quality Material: Our crochet bear head applique patches is made of high-quality cloth, comfortable and soft to the touch, bright and beautiful colors, exquisite workmanship, not easy to break or fall off. You can use it for a long time.

Unique Design: Our cloth patch is designed in the shape of a bear head. It comes in 6 colors, namely aquamarine, white, pink, yellow, blue, and orange, giving you more matching options when using it. The eyes, nose, and mouth are embellished with black, making the entire applique more vivid and cute.

Easy to Use: Each patch of bear hook fabric is of appropriate size, so you can confidently apply it to your creations,you can sew them on your clothes and they will stay on your clothes for a long time and they won't come off easily, or you can add glue on the back yourself.

Widely Applicable: You can use these patches to cover up blemishes or for decoration, they are suitable for adding creativity to denim coats, jackets, jeans, shirts, hoodies, clothing, backpacks, school bags, etc.
